item.title: Krabby Patty recipe
item.description: Ingredients: For 4 people : Lots of love 2 cans of crab meat 1 lightly beaten egg 1/2 lemon juice Breadcrumbs 1 tomato Hamburger bread Pickles 1 onion 4 salad leaves Frying oil Salt pepper For the sauce: Worcestershire sauce Ketchup Mustard Steps : In a bowl, beat 1 egg then add the crabmeat, breadcrumbs, lemon juice, salt and pepper. Mix until you get a homogeneous consistency.

item.title: About me
item.description: I’m a sea sponge who works as a fry cook at the Krusty Krab: The Krusty Krabe is a fast food restaurant known for it’s signature burger: The Krabby Patty Try to make one yourself and you will be as happy as I am. My first Krabby Patty You can take a look at the recipe here .

item.title: Fan Lyu (吕凡)
item.description: Personal Statement I’m a Postdoc Research Fellow in the Center for Research on Intelligent Perception and Computing (CRIPAC), Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences (CASIA) supervised by Prof. Liang Wang . I achieved my PhD position supervised by Prof. Wei Fengin the College of Intelligence and Computing, Tianjin University (TJU). I was graduated from Suzhou University of Science and Technology as a master at 2018 advised by Prof. Fuyuan Hu.

item.title: Publications
item.description: 2024 Weiqi Li, Fan Lyu, Fanhua Shang, Liang Wan, Wei Feng. Long-Tailed Learning as Multi-Objective Optimization. AAAI 2024. [pdf] [code] 2023 Kaile Du*, Fan Lyu*, Linyan Li, Fuyuan Hu, Wei Feng, Fenglei Xu, Xuefeng Xi, Hanjing Cheng. Multi-Label Continual Learning using Augmented Graph Convolutional Network. [pdf] Daofeng Liu*, Fan Lyu, Linyan Li, Fuyuan Hu. Centroid-based Re-hearsal for Online Continual Learning[C]. In ICASSP, 2023. Fan Lyu, Qing Sun, Fanhua Shang, Wei Feng, Liang Wan.
